text.title: Self-Healing Locators with Mandatory Audit Diff Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf references a rule id (including `skip-this-methodology`).

decision-tree.root-question: Does the app expose WAI-ARIA roles + accessible names AND has a healer plugin been wired in?

conclusion.verdict: no accessibility tree to match against
reject: role missing from match set

branch.when: blocklisted_pages empty AND app has payment/auth

text.example: Playwright suite with role+name → /checkout blocklisted → only changed locators healed → diff merged by reviewer → safe.
